codeReview.summary: The SEO feature implementation is complete and correct. The worker updated the game page head() with a descriptive title ('t3ingo — Playing Bingo') and a game-specific meta description tag. The landing page inherits og:title, og:description, and meta description from the root route's head(). The manifest.json was rebranded from 'TanStack App' scaffold defaults to 't3ingo — Theo Twitch Bingo' with matching theme_color, background_color, and description. The worker also verified via curl that all 25 board squares render in the initial SSR HTML response. A pre-existing ShareButton test fix was bundled into this commit (fixing flaky timer-based tests with fake timers). The ShareButton component itself was also committed as a previously untracked file from a prior feature.

sharedStateObservations.observation: TanStack Start route head() meta tags defined in child routes (game.tsx) do not fully replace root route meta tags — the child meta are appended/merged with the root meta. The worker relied on this behavior (game page inherits og:title and og:description from root). This merging behavior is not documented in AGENTS.md or the library.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: src/routes/__root.tsx defines og:title, og:description, og:type, and description. src/routes/game.tsx head() only defines title and description. The worker verified via curl that og tags from root are present on the game page.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The ShareButton.tsx and ShareButton.test.tsx were committed as part of this SEO feature but were actually created by the prior 'share-button' feature. The files were untracked and got scooped into this commit. This is benign but worth noting for attribution clarity.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: git diff shows both ShareButton.tsx (new file, 110 lines) and ShareButton.test.tsx (new file, 274 lines) added in commit 63f9996 which is the SEO commit. The handoff notes: 'Committed previously untracked ShareButton.tsx and ShareButton.test.tsx from the share-button feature.'

summary: PASS — The SEO feature is fully implemented and correct. All four expected behaviors are satisfied: (1) game page has descriptive title 't3ingo — Playing Bingo', (2) both pages have meta description tags, (3) landing page has og:title and og:description (from root route inheritance), and (4) game page board content is rendered in the initial SSR HTML. The manifest.json was properly rebranded from scaffold defaults. The worker verified all requirements via curl against the running dev server, ran full test suite (161 passing), typecheck, and lint — all clean. No blocking issues found.
